name: FaultsStatusUpdate
description: Customer is asking for a status update on a fault they've already reported, an ongoing repair, or a known service outage in their area — they want to know if the issue has been fixed, when it will be resolved, or what progress has been made. This is not a new fault report.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can I get an update on my {statusCheckType} ?
Has the {statusCheckType} been resolved yet?
What's happening with the {statusCheckType} I reported?
How long until the {statusCheckType} is fixed?
Is there an estimated time for the {statusCheckType} to be resolved?
I reported a {statusCheckType} yesterday — any update?
I'm still waiting for the {statusCheckType} to be fixed
You said the {statusCheckType} would be sorted by today — what's going on?
Has the engineer finished the {statusCheckType} on my line?
Is the {statusCheckType} in my area still ongoing?
I was told the {statusCheckType} would be fixed within 24 hours and it's been two days
Can you check if the {statusCheckType} on my account has been closed?
When will my services be back to normal after the {statusCheckType} ?
Nobody has updated me about the {statusCheckType} I raised last week
Is there any new information on the {statusCheckType} affecting my broadband?
I've been without service since the {statusCheckType} was reported — when will it be sorted?
Any progress on the {statusCheckType} ?
I logged a fault and I'm still having the same problem
The issue I called about before hasn't been resolved yet
My internet has been down since yesterday — is there an outage?
Check the status of my reported {statusCheckType}
update on {statusCheckType}
